data.title: CZ: CEX and DEX will coexist for a long time; AI × Crypto is the fastest-growing area for crypto applications.
data.description: According to @linwanwan823's summary of CZ's remarks during the Binance Square AMA, CZ believes that this market cycle may not necessarily follow the four-year cycle pattern; the US has for the first time explicitly supported the crypto industry and is pushing forward legislation, and other countries are likely to follow suit; stablecoins and RWA are developing rapidly, and the industry is sound in the long term, but short-term prospects are unpredictable. Regarding industry trends, CZ believes that CEXs and DEXs will coexist for a long time, with new users still needing CEXs as an entry point, and only advanced users potentially switching to DEXs; the market is large enough to accommodate thousands of CEXs and DEXs, and it's not a zero-sum game. RWA tokenization is a definite major trend, and countries are promoting the creation of liquidity for their assets through tokens; AI × Crypto is the fastest-growing area for crypto applications, and in the next 2-5 years, small-amount, cross-border, high-frequency payments between AI agents will likely use cryptocurrencies, but this is still in its early stages. Regarding the Aster coin price, CZ stated that short-term fluctuations should not be overemphasized, and he has confidence in the team. Currently, the industry is divided between "extreme transparency" and "privacy protection," and it is unclear which path will ultimately prevail. In response to public opinion, CZ stated that not addressing FUD is the best approach. He criticized excessive competition within the Chinese-language community and called for unity to expand international influence. Binance Square is developing a Web3 version of YouTube, with monetization strategies including trader rebates and creator token rewards. CZ considers Africa a window that crypto shouldn't miss, noting low banking penetration and high smartphone penetration rates; he has already visited over 12 African countries. The AMA livestream garnered approximately $18,000 in donations, which CZ announced he will donate entirely to Giggle Academy.

data.title: The Bhutanese government sold another $6.7 million worth of BTC.
data.description: According to Arkham, the Bhutanese government has sold another $6.7 million worth of BTC. It now still holds $372 million worth of BTC in identified wallets.

data.title: Bitcoin Sees One of Its Biggest Sell-Offs Ever
data.description:
According to a report shared by CryptoQuant, Bitcoin has just recorded $2. 3 billion in realized losses (7-day average), one of the largest capitulation events in its history. This level of losses puts the current drop alongside major crashes such as 2021, the 2022 Luna/FTX collapse, and the mid-2024 correction
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-sees-one-of-its-biggest-sell-offs-ever/

data.title: Singapore Addresses Gambling Risks in Mystery Shopping Trend
data.description: Singapore is taking steps to address the gambling risks associated with the growing trend of mystery shopping. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting concerns over products that hide their specific contents from consumers, potentially encouraging gambling-like behavior. The city-state is focusing on regulating these products to mitigate any negative impacts on shoppers. Authorities are considering measures to ensure transparency and protect consumers from potential addiction and financial harm. The move comes as mystery shopping gains popularity worldwide, raising questions about its implications for consumer safety and responsible purchasing practices.

data.title: Japanese Stocks Surge in 2026 Amid Growth Policies
data.description: Japanese equities are experiencing a strong start to 2026, driven by Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi's growth policies. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that these policies have propelled Japanese stocks to the forefront of developed market rankings. The positive momentum reflects investor confidence in the government's economic strategies, which aim to stimulate growth and enhance market performance. Analysts suggest that the current trajectory could continue, provided the policies maintain their effectiveness in boosting the economy. As Japan's market gains traction, it remains a focal point for investors seeking opportunities in developed markets.

data.title: Opinion: Aave Labs' new proposal is promising, but the process needs clear disclosure and transparency.
data.description: DeFi researcher Ignas published an article on the X platform stating that Aave Labs has proposed a new initiative suggesting that 100% of the protocol's revenue be allocated to the DAO and that the Aave brand IP be granted to a new foundation. Ignas believes that developers, business development, and marketing personnel should receive substantial rewards. After cutting off its own revenue stream, Aave Labs should apply for an annual budget from the DAO, but the process needs clear disclosure and transparency. He points out that questions remain about who actually controls the new foundation. A recent proposal requiring disclosure of voting addresses was rejected by some unidentified wallets. If Aave Labs wants to maintain control, they have an incentive to hold AAVE tokens. Ignas wants to see clear disclosure and ensure that the granted 75,000 AAVE tokens are not used for voting. He also believes that the plan to migrate from v3 to v4 within 8 to 12 months is too fast, but is generally optimistic about the proposal. Related information: "Aave Labs: Proposes 'Aave Will Win' Plan, Sending 100% of Product Revenue to the DAO"

data.title: A major whale has deposited another 2,035 BTC, approximately $135 million, into Binance.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale address starting with 3NVeXm has just deposited another 2,035 BTC (approximately $135.23 million) into Binance. Today's report stated that this whale has deposited 8,200 BTC (approximately $559 million) into Binance over the past two days.

data.title: Luoyang Molybdenum Commences Full Operations at Brazilian Gold Mines
data.description: Luoyang Molybdenum has successfully completed the acquisition of a Brazilian gold mining project, according to Jin10. Following this acquisition, four gold mines located in Maranhão, Bahia, and Minas Gerais have commenced full operations. In January, while the RDM gold mine experienced a production impact due to the rescheduling of crusher maintenance from February to January, the Aurizona, Santa Luz, and Fazenda mines exceeded their production targets for the month.

data.title: Bitcoin Miner outflows surge to $3.2B in two days, Amid Price Volatility
data.description:
Bitcoin mining outflows surged to 49K, valued at approximately $3 billion, in just two days, according to onchain data.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-miner-outflows-surge-to-3-2b/

data.title: Scott Melker Describes Optimistic Atmosphere at Event
data.description: Scott Melker, host of The Wolf Of All Streets Podcast, posted on X about his experience at an event. He described the atmosphere as optimistic and excited about the future.

data.title: Iron Ore Prices Decline Amid Rising Chinese Stockpiles and Increased Vale Output
data.description: Iron ore prices fell for the third consecutive day due to growing stockpiles in China and higher-than-anticipated production from Brazilian mining company Vale. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting concerns about potential oversupply in the market. The increase in Chinese inventories and Vale's output has raised fears among investors, contributing to the downward pressure on iron ore prices. Market analysts are closely monitoring these developments as they could impact global supply dynamics.

data.title: Ethereum ETFs Face Consecutive Outflows Totaling $113 Million
data.description: U.S. spot Ethereum ETFs experienced a net outflow of $113.08 million on February 12. According to NS3.AI, this marks the second consecutive day of outflows, with no ETF recording net inflows. Major ETFs such as BlackRock's ETHA, Fidelity's FETH, and Grayscale's ETHE all saw significant withdrawals.

data.title: Base Ecosystem Meme Coin AntiHunter Experiences Significant Market Surge
data.description:
On February 13, the market value of the Base ecosystem meme coin AntiHunter surged by 35% within an hour, reaching $8 million, with a 24-hour trading volume of $3.4 million. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the coin also saw a 26% increase over six hours.

BlockBeats cautions users that meme coin trading is highly volatile, often driven by market sentiment and speculative concepts, lacking intrinsic value or practical use cases. Investors are advised to be mindful of the associated risks.

data.title: Keir Starmer's Government Faces Criticism Over Recent Appointments
data.description: The recent appointments of Peter Mandelson and Matthew Doyle have sparked criticism, with claims that Keir Starmer's government is not adequately considering women's voices. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting concerns about the lack of female representation in these key roles. The decisions have drawn attention to the ongoing debate about gender balance in political appointments and the need for more inclusive representation in government positions.

data.title: WLFI and USD1 Strategic Plans Discussed in Hong Kong
data.description: Jack Kong, CEO of Nano Labs, posted on X about welcoming Watcher Chase, Zak Folkman, and Ryan Fang to Hong Kong for discussions on the next major strategies for WLFI and USD1. He also extended well wishes for a speedy recovery to Zak Folkman and Jackyi LD.

data.title: Silver prices continued to fluctuate, with Gate XAG ranking among the top three globally in 24-hour trading volume.
data.description: Recently, international silver prices have continued their volatile pattern, with the trading range widening further. Market data shows that silver opened at $75.109 today, reaching a high of $77.286, and is currently trading at $76.760, a gain of 2.19%. The price center continues to rise, and market sentiment remains active. Influenced by changes in macroeconomic expectations and safe-haven demand, silver, with its dual industrial and metal attributes, has once again become a focus of capital attention. According to CoinGlass data, the 24-hour trading volume of XAG (silver) on the Gate platform reached $194 million, a gain of 91.72%, ranking among the top three globally, demonstrating Gate's depth and liquidity advantage in the metals sector. Overall, silver trading activity has significantly increased, and the liquidity structure of mainstream platforms remains robust. Gate TradFi has officially launched its trading platform, available via both an app and a web browser. It covers traditional financial trading sectors including stocks, metals, forex, indices, and commodities, supporting a wide range of trading instruments such as gold, silver, Tesla, Nvidia, and Apple. Users can enjoy leverage up to 500x and a highly competitive fee structure. Through continuous product innovation and infrastructure upgrades, Gate aims to accelerate the deep integration of crypto platforms with traditional financial markets, creating a professional-grade TradFi platform for global users.

data.title: XRP Price Walks a Tightrope As Downside Threat Persists
data.description:
XRP price failed to surpass $1. 4650 and started another decline. The price is now correcting gains and might struggle to stay above $1. 320
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-price-walks-a-tightrope-1-34/

data.title: Malaysia's Economic Growth Surpasses Expectations in Fourth Quarter
data.description: Malaysia's economy experienced a stronger-than-anticipated expansion in the fourth quarter, reinforcing its position as a robust growth driver in Southeast Asia. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the country's economic resilience amid global uncertainties. The growth figures exceeded analysts' predictions, showcasing Malaysia's ability to navigate economic challenges effectively. This performance underscores the nation's strategic economic policies and its capacity to maintain momentum in a competitive regional landscape. The positive economic indicators reflect Malaysia's potential for sustained growth, contributing to its standing as a key player in Southeast Asia's economic development.

data.title: Minor International Considers Hong Kong IPO for Restaurant Business
data.description: Thailand's Minor International, a leading hospitality group in Asia, is reportedly exploring the possibility of launching an initial public offering (IPO) for its restaurant division in Hong Kong. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this move comes as Bangkok's stock market seeks to rejuvenate domestic activity. The potential IPO reflects Minor International's strategic efforts to expand its financial footprint and capitalize on opportunities in the Hong Kong market. The company is known for its extensive portfolio in the hospitality sector, and this development could mark a significant step in its growth trajectory.

data.title: Bangchak to Acquire Chevron's Hong Kong Fuel Business for $270 Million
data.description: Bangchak Corporation has announced its acquisition of Chevron's fuel business in Hong Kong for $270 million. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this move as part of Bangchak's strategy to enhance its international presence. The Thai energy company aims to expand its operations beyond domestic borders, reflecting its commitment to growth in the global energy market. This acquisition marks a significant step in Bangchak's efforts to strengthen its position in the Asian energy sector.
